creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
Package creation of sysutils/k3b-kde4 fails.

Output of poudriere log:

tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1
     
Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/k3b-kde4.
====>> Saved k3b-2.0.2_12 wrkdir to: /home/poudriere/data/wrkdirs/j8sp64-PT2/PT2/k3b-2.0.2_12.tbz
build of /usr/ports/sysutils/k3b-kde4 ended at Mon Jul 29 15:23:09 CEST 2013
build time: 00:10:24

How-To-Repeat: poudriere bulk -p <portstree> -j <jailname> sysutils/k3b-kde4
